emails.subject: RE: APS Filing
emails.body: Seems to me that we need to engage in AZ (along with NV and OR?) in the Western states to try and push competition forward. Why don't we first assemble a (1) what we know what we don't know memo and then (2) look at oppotunities to push our agenda. Leslie everyone is looking to you to lead us to the promised land in AZ... GO GET 'EM!!!!!! Jim

emails.subject: RE: APS Filing
emails.body: Ok. It seems that (1) we should try and get a handle on AZ Leslie Lawner please put something together and (2) need a Market Plan on NV Pat Keene put together. Paul, I appreciate the issue with OR but I'd like to know what is the opportunity and make sure that PGE is not destroying our chances Christi got wind of a Imbalance pgm that was punative to marketers. Who can we meet with to discuss? Jim

emails.subject: RE: APS Filing
emails.body: Robert Neustaedter has worked up an analysis of the PGE and PP&L programs. Ree: who can we meet with to discuss--do you mean at PGE or at ENA? Let's figure out whether the rumor of a punitive imbalance charge is true before we do anything more.

emails.subject: RE: APS Filing
emails.body: I was hoping to meet with PGE (but will hold off it is imprudent). Christi has reviewed something. I'll loop her in to find out all the details. Jim
